evals.prompt: I just finished implementing JIRA-123. The code is done and tests pass. Can you commit my changes and create a PR?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs git add, commit with message per constitution, push, creates PR via mcp-github, adds Jira label bot-cx-ai-code-review, and performs Jira transitions.

evals.prompt: Run /commitAndPush for issue JIRA-123. Implementation is complete.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs the full commit-and-push workflow: validate, git add, commit, push, create PR, add Jira label bot-cx-ai-code-review, Jira transitions.

evals.prompt: I finished the bugfix for JIRA-123. Commit, push and create PR please.
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes issue key PROJ-789 and triggers commit-and-push skill.
